message:
fix: Consistent mutable parameter naming in method bodies

Use NameGen.mutable() for variable name AND var_renames entry to ensure
consistency. Previously the variable was named `{name}__mut` but
var_renames pointed to `__m{n}_m_{name}`, causing undeclared identifier
errors when unpacking assignments referenced the renamed variable.

Also removes mutated params from func_local_vars so expressions.zig
uses var_renames lookup correctly.
